title: BSNC Announces 2023 Annual Meeting Election Results
summary: BSNC held its 2023 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Saturday, Oct. 7 in Anchorage, Alaska at the Dena’ina Center. The sole resolution to reduce the quorum requirement from 50% +1 of eligible shares present or represented by proxy to 1/3 of eligible shares was approved by shareholders with 74 percent voting in f...

title: BSNC Announces 2023 Tim Towarak Memorial Scholarship Awardee
summary: BSNC is excited to announce Marilynn Nashalook of Unalakleet as the 2023 awardee of the Beringia Settlement Trust (BST) Tim Towarak Memorial Scholarship. This scholarship is a $10,000 merit-based competitive scholarship awarded annually to one high-performing student enrolled in an accredited colleg...
